justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, but could have offered a slightly wider range of options in each turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and did not ask for information already provided by the user.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was mostly smooth and professional, with only minor friction points due to the agent's limited alternative suggestions.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context well and expanded the search intelligently after each unavailable slot, though it could have offered more diverse options.
